touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Avery Hernandez, VP of Sales at QuartzIntelligence. No answer, left voicemail introducing our revenue intelligence platform and mentioning we help managed IT companies improve forecast accuracy.

touches.ai_summary: Brief cold call with Avery Hernandez. Introduced our platform and how we help cybersecurity/managed IT companies improve forecasting. Avery acknowledged current challenges with pipeline visibility and agreed to a longer qualification call.

questions_asked.question: What makes you different from other revenue intelligence tools?
questions_asked.answer: We specialize in helping technical services companies with complex sales cycles get real-time deal insights and accurate forecasting, not just call recording.

next_steps: Schedule 30-minute qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Avery Hernandez. Discussed QuartzIntelligence's challenges with forecast accuracy across their 9-person sales team. Currently using spreadsheets and manual pipeline reviews. Avery mentioned they're also looking at Chorus. Strong interest in automations and consulting to improve their process.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for forecasting and pipeline reviews?
questions_asked.answer: Weekly manual reviews with spreadsheets. Takes hours and still miss deals slipping. Need better real-time visibility.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform handle technical services sales cycles versus transactional sales?
questions_asked.answer: We built our models specifically for longer B2B cycles with multiple stakeholders, which is common in managed IT and cybersecurity.

questions_asked.question: What other solutions are you evaluating?
questions_asked.answer: We're looking at Chorus as well, but want to understand if there are better options for our specific use case.

next_steps: Send use case overview and ROI calculator
Schedule discovery call to dive deeper into requirements

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Avery with use case materials for managed IT/cybersecurity companies, ROI calculator based on their team size, and case study from similar enterprise customer. Avery responded confirming review and asking about implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's typical implementation timeline for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for initial setup with automations_plus_consulting package, then ongoing optimization.

next_steps: Avery to review materials with team
Schedule discovery call

touches.ai_summary: Email from Avery sharing initial feedback from sales leadership team. Positive response to forecasting capabilities. Asked for more details on how we compare to Chorus specifically for their automation needs.

questions_asked.question: Can you send a comparison of your automation features versus Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: Sent detailed feature comparison highlighting our consulting-led automation setup versus Chorus's self-service approach.

next_steps: Review comparison doc

touches.ai_summary: Brief email exchange confirming discovery call scheduled for next week. Avery mentioned they want to involve their CEO Madison Becker and account managers Jessica Okafor and Finn Watanabe in evaluation process.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled
Send calendar invite to expanded team

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Avery diving into current pain points. QuartzIntelligence struggles with inconsistent pipeline hygiene and late-stage deal slippage. Avery emphasized need for automation to reduce manual work and consulting to establish best practices. Discussed 45-seat deployment for sales and sales ops team.

questions_asked.question: What percentage of your forecasted deals are slipping or being pushed?
questions_asked.answer: About 30-40% of our commit deals slip each quarter. It's creating credibility issues with our board.

questions_asked.question: How are you currently tracking buyer engagement and deal health?
questions_asked.answer: Manually through rep updates in weekly meetings. Very subjective and often wrong.

questions_asked.question: Does your consulting package include help with our specific forecasting methodology?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we work with your team to build custom forecasting models based on your historical data and sales process.

next_steps: Send detailed automation capabilities doc
Schedule technical deep-dive with account managers

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up discovery call focused on technical requirements and integration needs. Discussed CRM integration, data privacy requirements for cybersecurity company, and reporting needs for executive team. Avery confirmed budget range aligns with our proposal.

questions_asked.question: What CRM are you currently using?
questions_asked.answer: Salesforce. We need tight integration and don't want to change rep workflows.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle data security given our industry requirements?
questions_asked.answer: SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, with enterprise-grade encryption. Can provide full security documentation.

next_steps: Send security documentation and integration specs
Schedule demo for next phase

touches.ai_summary: Brief call with Avery to finalize demo agenda and confirm stakeholder participation. Discussed showing live forecasting automation and deal health scoring. Avery mentioned Chorus demo scheduled for following week.

questions_asked.question: What specific capabilities do you want to see in the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Forecasting automation, deal health alerts, and how consulting helps us customize it to our process.

next_steps: Demo scheduled with Avery and team
Prepare custom demo environment

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive demo with Avery Hernandez covering forecasting automation, deal health scoring, and pipeline analytics. Showed how automations reduce manual work and improve accuracy. Demonstrated consulting approach to customization. Strong engagement, multiple questions about implementation. Avery very impressed with automation capabilities versus manual spreadsheet process.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the deal health scoring to our specific deal stages and sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. Our consulting team works with you to map your stages and build custom scoring based on your historical win/loss patterns.

questions_asked.question: How long does it take to see ROI on forecasting accuracy improvements?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see measurable improvement within first quarter, with full ROI typically by quarter 2-3.

questions_asked.question: What level of ongoing support comes with the consulting package?
questions_asked.answer: Quarterly business reviews, ongoing model optimization, and dedicated CSM. Consulting hours can be used for new automations as needs evolve.

next_steps: Avery to debrief with leadership team
Schedule technical evaluation with Jessica Okafor and Finn Watanabe
Send demo recording and follow-up materials

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Jessica Okafor focusing on end-user experience, reporting capabilities, and day-to-day workflow impact. Jessica tested the interface, asked detailed questions about automation rules and alert configurations. Positive feedback on usability. Some questions about integration complexity with their current tech stack.

questions_asked.question: How much technical lift is required from our team during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Minimal. Our consulting team handles most of the setup. You'll need to provide CRM access and participate in process mapping sessions.

questions_asked.question: Can individual reps customize their own alert thresholds and views?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, admins set defaults but reps can personalize their workspace within defined guardrails.

questions_asked.question: What concerns do you have about changing your current workflow?
questions_asked.answer: Just want to make sure it actually reduces work rather than adding another tool to maintain. Looks promising so far.

next_steps: Jessica to test in sandbox environment
Share findings with Finn and Avery

touches.ai_summary: Second demo with Avery, originally scheduled earlier but rescheduled. Focused on executive reporting and board-level forecasting views. Showed how CEO and leadership can get real-time pipeline visibility without manual updates. Avery mentioned Chorus demo went well but felt their solution was more self-service oriented without the consulting support QuartzIntelligence needs.

questions_asked.question: How does your consulting approach differ from Chorus's implementation model?
questions_asked.answer: Chorus is more self-service with documentation and training. We assign consultants who build custom automations with you and optimize over time based on your specific sales motion.

questions_asked.question: What happens if our process changes significantly after implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Consulting hours are ongoing. We adapt automations and models as your business evolves. Not a set-it-and-forget-it approach.

objections: Need to make sure the investment in consulting actually delivers versus just doing it ourselves with a cheaper tool
next_steps: Prepare executive-level demo for CEO Madison Becker
Send consulting ROI analysis and customer success stories

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Avery with executive demo materials for Madison Becker, consulting ROI analysis, and case studies from similar cybersecurity/managed IT companies. Avery responded asking about pricing structure and confirmed interest in moving forward with CEO demo.

questions_asked.question: Can you share preliminary pricing for 45 seats with automations and consulting?
questions_asked.answer: Will prepare formal proposal, but ballpark is $60-75K annually depending on consulting hour allocation and feature tier.

next_steps: Schedule exec meeting with Madison Becker

touches.ai_summary: Final demo focused on specific automation use cases QuartzIntelligence identified as highest priority: automated deal health alerts, forecast category recommendations, and pipeline coverage analytics. Walked through implementation roadmap and consulting engagement model. Avery confirmed internal alignment to move to proposal stage.

questions_asked.question: What's the breakdown between platform cost and consulting costs in the pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Platform licensing is about 60% of total investment, consulting package is 40%. Can adjust consulting hours based on your needs.

questions_asked.question: Are there any remaining concerns from your team before we go to proposal?
questions_asked.answer: Just need to get Madison comfortable with the investment level and consulting model versus Chorus.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can we start seeing value after contract signing?
questions_asked.answer: First automations live within 2-3 weeks. Full deployment with all customizations typically 4-6 weeks.

next_steps: Prepare proposal for 45 seats with automations_plus_consulting
Schedule exec meeting with Madison Becker

touches.ai_summary: Email to Avery with formal proposal for $69,500 ACV covering 45 seats and automations_plus_consulting package. Included implementation timeline, ROI projections, and executive summary for Madison. Avery acknowledged receipt and confirmed exec meeting scheduled.

Avery to prep Madison on evaluation process

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with CEO Madison Becker and Avery Hernandez. Focused on strategic value of forecast accuracy for board reporting and investor confidence. Madison engaged and asked about competitive landscape. Acknowledged looking at Chorus but appreciates the consulting-led approach for their complex managed IT sales process. Some questions about pricing relative to alternatives.

questions_asked.question: Why should we invest more in your platform with consulting versus a lower-cost solution like Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: Chorus is excellent for call recording and self-service analytics. For complex B2B sales like yours, our consulting ensures automations actually match your process and drive adoption. Lower total cost of ownership when you factor in internal resources needed for DIY approach.

questions_asked.question: What guarantees do we have around forecasting accuracy improvements?
questions_asked.answer: While we can't guarantee specific percentages, our customers average 25-40% reduction in forecast error within first two quarters. Happy to include performance milestones in consulting SLA.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Want to have something in place before end of quarter. Need to finalize in next 2-3 weeks.

objections: Price point is higher than we initially budgeted, need to understand if consulting value justifies the premium
next_steps: Revise proposal with detailed consulting ROI breakdown
Schedule follow-up on any pricing questions

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Avery. QuartzIntelligence wants to move forward but looking for pricing flexibility. Discussed potentially reducing consulting hours to lower annual cost, but Avery concerned that would defeat the purpose. Explored multi-year agreement options for better pricing. Generally positive but clear budget pressure.

questions_asked.question: What's the best pricing you can offer for a two-year commitment?
questions_asked.answer: Can offer 12% discount on year two for a two-year agreement, bringing blended rate to about $65K annually.

questions_asked.question: Is budget the main blocker or are there other concerns?
questions_asked.answer: Budget is the main thing. Madison is sold on the value but wants to make sure we're getting best possible terms.

objections: Need to get closer to $60K annually to make the budget work without additional approvals

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Avery to finalize terms. Discussed various options including reducing seat count, adjusting consulting hour allocation, and multi-year terms. Landed on keeping full 45 seats and automations_plus_consulting package at $69,500 with slightly reduced consulting hours but committed multi-year relationship. Avery comfortable with this approach.

questions_asked.question: If we can meet the $69,500 annual price point with full capabilities, does that work for your budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that works. Madison approved that level. Just want to make sure we're not cutting corners on the consulting that makes this valuable.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the ongoing support after the initial implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Quarterly business reviews, ongoing automation optimization, dedicated CSM, and reserved consulting hours for new use cases each quarter.
